reason: Exact-source daily/weekly labels already attached where allowed; remaining gaps are intraday/monthly, non-yfinance, missing exact instruments, or rejected Nasdaq near-proxies.
Labels are HMM/GMM state labels such as Calm/Stressful/Transitional, not independent Bull/Bear/Sideways/Crisis source labels for target instruments/timeframes.
Nifty50 daily integer regimes are not target instruments and do not expose independent MainRegimeV2 root semantics.
BTC HMM6 labels are model-inferred HMM states, not independent source-backed roots.
Dune schema is promising for Manipulation, but no replayable rows were exported because DUNE_API_KEY is absent and public endpoint returned 401.
